title: Universal detection of nucleic acids using Rainbow primers and probes for digital PCR
author: Vandesompele, Jo

description: Presentation given on Rainbow universal dPCR probes as part of the "Digital PCR specialist course" on 18-20 May 2026 (Ghent, Belgium), organized by DIGPCR (https://digpcr.ugent.be/).
